## Summary

Describe the hardware-review, documentation, or safety-note change.

## Review Area

- [ ] Schematic / PCB
- [ ] Power path / thermal assumptions
- [ ] Manufacturing files
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety / bench testing

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the safety notes in `SAFETY.md`.
- [ ] I linked screenshots, measurements, or schematic references where useful.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
